scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix employee-portal
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,CUSTOMER,EMPLOYEE" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix employee-portal run dev"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "API,CUSTOMER,EMPLOYEE" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgMagenta.bold" "npm --prefix backend start" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix employee-portal run dev"
